title: HardcoreLive
description: 10-day datapack for hardcore mode where the difficulty increases every day.
body:
![HardcoreLive logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ac51e676f33fa7912c679576db75b8bb357057b.png)

## This datapack is an add-on for the hardcore mode with daily difficulty increase for 10 days. 


> The datapack is only available in **Spanish** at the moment 


For a better experience use the official [Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hardcorelive-texture-pack).

### It contains:

- Mobs classes.
- New items.
- Inventory reduction.
- 5 Armours to be discovered with potion effects when wearing it.
- Custom dragon battle.


<details>
<summary>Difficulty changes:</summary>

The changes can be found in the gallery but only in Spanish.

- If you want to know what day you are on:
```
  /trigger Dias
```


- If you are changing the day you must have the Admin tag:

```
  /tag @s add Admin
```


- To change the day:

```
  /trigger Dia1 
  /trigger Dia2 
  /trigger Dia3 
  /trigger Dia4 
  /trigger Dia5 
  /trigger Dia6 
  /trigger Dia7 
  /trigger Dia8 
  /trigger Dia9 
  /trigger Dia10
```

</details>

If you have any questions, join our [**discord**](https://discord.gg/3Dwazw8H8T).

**Además, si hablas español puedes unirte a nuestro [discord](https://discord.gg/3Dwazw8H8T) para poder tener la oportunidad de participar en futuros servidores hardcore.** 😉
